User.title: User
User.description: User profile and role information, including biometric credentials.

uid.description: Unique user ID from Firebase Auth.

role.description: The user's role in the system.

Attendance.title: Attendance
Attendance.description: Attendance record for a user on a specific date, including arrival and departure times.

userId.description: The UID of the user whose attendance is being marked.

date.description: The date for which attendance is marked (YYYY-MM-DD).

markedBy.description: The UID of the admin who marked the attendance, or 'self' if checked in by user.

checkIn.description: The time the user checked in.

checkOut.description: The time the user checked out.

timestamp.description: The exact time the record was created.
